allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/data/songCatalog.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Artists:', d.artists.length\); let s=0; d.artists.forEach\(a=>s+=a.songs.length\); console.log\('Songs:', s\); d.artists.forEach\(a=>console.log\(' -', a.name, ':', a.songs.length, 'songs'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/data/metadata.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Songs\(covers\):', d.songs.length\); console.log\('Singers:', d.singers.length\); const artists=new Set\(\); d.songs.forEach\(s=>artists.add\(s.originalArtist\)\); console.log\('Unique original artists:', artists.size\); artists.forEach\(a=>console.log\(' -', a\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('package.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('dependencies:'\); Object.entries\(p.dependencies||{}\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(' ', k, v\)\); console.log\('devDependencies:'\); Object.entries\(p.devDependencies||{}\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(' ', k, v\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/data/songCatalog.json','utf8'\)\); let s=0; d.artists.forEach\(a=>s+=a.songs.length\); let jp=0,en=0; d.artists.forEach\(a=>{if\(/[\\u3000-\\u9FFF\\uF900-\\uFAFF]/.test\(a.name\)\)jp++;else en++}\); console.log\('Artists:',d.artists.length,'Songs:',s,'JP names:',jp,'EN names:',en\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/data/songCatalog.json','utf8'\)\); let s=0; d.artists.forEach\(a=>s+=a.songs.length\); let jp=0,en=0; d.artists.forEach\(a=>{if\(/[\\u3000-\\u9FFF\\uF900-\\uFAFF]/.test\(a.name\)\)jp++;else en++}\); console.log\('Artists:',d.artists.length,'Songs:',s,'JP names:',jp,'EN names:',en\); console.log\('File size:', \(fs.statSync\('src/data/songCatalog.json'\).size/1024/1024\).toFixed\(1\)+'MB'\)")
